columns.extraction_plan: Look in Table 1, under the "Age, years" section. Find the row labeled "Median". The value for the "SOC plus abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy; n=583)" column is the median age for the treatment group. The value is 67 (61-72). For the ADT with docetaxel population, the value for the "SOC plus abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy; n=355)" column is 66 (60-70).

Look in Table 1, under the "Age, years" section. Find the row labeled "Median". The value for the "SOC without abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy; n=589)" column is the median age for the control group. The value is 66 (59-72). For the ADT with docetaxel population, the value for the "SOC without abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy; n=355)" column is 66 (59-70).
